data.body: S2 DONE (pending your review). Created src/rebar/grounding/resolve.py (~520 LOC) + tests/unit/grounding/test_resolve.py (36 tests, all green; full grounding pkg 110 passed). mypy clean. refute_absence() implements the spike-E2 guard: unique bare name/import -> refuted (def-site location); collision (>1 def) -> abstain(ambiguous); member/dotted -> abstain; kind=file -> path-existence refute (with ../ escape guard); kind=dependency -> abstain routed to T0 deps lane (S3); not-found -> abstain (confirm-only, never asserts absent). Polyglot index via real ctags 6.2.1 (-R --output-format=json --fields=+lK), per-lang coverage recorded, version captured. unsupported_lang gate via ctags --list-languages + .rebar/grounding.toml [grounding] slot (ctags_optlib_dirs/ctags_options/supported_languages) threaded as --optlib-dir/--options. Deterministic extract_references()/extract_references_from_diff() for Python imports (prose out of scope). Real-corpus sanity (src/rebar, 143 internal imports): 76% refute yield, 0 false-refute on hallucinated controls -- reproduces spike E3. Every emitted record passes ev.validate(). NOTE for integration: I did NOT touch grounding.schema.json/__init__.py/_optional.py/pyproject; resolve attaches the reference field only when its kind is in the schema's CURRENT enum (read at runtime) so records validate today and auto-upgrade once you patch the enum to the 5-set. See INTEGRATION NEEDS in my report for the exact JSON patch + exports.
